reason_for_classification: Video shows LapSim branding, equipment setup frames, and demonstration of peg transfer technique without actual trainee performance. Frames show setup and positioning but not a complete timed performance run. Content appears to be educational/tutorial in nature.

frame_analyses.description: Black screen with LapSim by surgicalscience branding
Equipment setup view showing peg board and instruments off-screen
Two grasping instruments visible, Penrose drain with pegs in circular arrangement visible in lower right circle. Instruments positioning for task initiation.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instruments held in ready position above peg board

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper approaching pegs, right grasper visible. Peg board clearly visible in magnified view circle on right.
Both instruments engaged with task setup. Demonstrates grasper control and positioning relative to peg board.
Instruments maintaining control of pegs/objects. Demonstrating technique for object manipulation.
Video appears to fade to black, indicating end of demonstration segment
Black screen, return to LapSim branding

scoring_note: This video is classified as INSTRUCTIONAL/DEMONSTRATION content, not a performance by a trainee. No FLS score is calculated for instructional videos. The content shows equipment setup and initial positioning techniques but does not constitute a complete timed performance run with measurable completion time and penalties.

demonstrated_techniques: Peg board layout and object arrangement

cannot_score: Video does not show a complete timed performance attempt. No completion time can be measured. No penalties can be assessed. Video is educational/tutorial in nature rather than a performance assessment.
recommendation: If a performance video of this peg transfer task is available, please provide that for scoring. This video is suitable for learning task setup but not for performance evaluation.
